info.title: Platform QTI 3 Repository API
info.summary: Generated QTI repository API schemas from the structured QTI dictionary source.
info.description: This OpenAPI document is generated from dictionary/qti-core.v1.json. It documents the planned QTI repository projection API. It is not a delivery/runtime conformance claim and is not executable on GitHub Pages until a backend is added.

servers.description: Portal host; QTI endpoints are planned documentation until backend runtime exists.

get.description: An imported assessment bundle containing QTI XML, resources, media, metadata, and a manifest.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Package record.

get.description: One question, task, or prompt plus its response variables, scoring rules, body content, feedback, and accessibility metadata.

get.summary: Get one QTI Assessment Item record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Assessment Item record.

get.description: Shared content such as a reading passage, chart, scenario, or media asset used by one or more items.

get.summary: Get one QTI Assessment Stimulus record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Assessment Stimulus record.

get.description: A whole test definition, including parts, sections, item references, timing, outcomes, and feedback.

get.summary: Get one QTI Assessment Test record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Assessment Test record.

get.description: A major part of a test that controls navigation, submission, timing, and item-session behavior.

get.summary: Get one QTI Test Part record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Test Part record.

get.description: A group inside a test that can organize item references, nested sections, randomization, and section-level rules.

get.summary: Get one QTI Assessment Section record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Assessment Section record.

get.description: A test's reference to an item file, including test-specific category, timing, weight, and selection behavior.

get.summary: Get one QTI Item Reference record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Item Reference record.

get.description: A response, outcome, template, or context variable used by an item or test.

get.summary: Get one QTI Variable Declaration record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Variable Declaration record.

get.description: The part of an item where the learner answers, such as choosing, typing, matching, uploading, clicking, or using media.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Interaction record.

get.description: A preserved summary of response, outcome, template, branch, or precondition logic from QTI XML.

get.summary: Get one QTI Processing Rule record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Processing Rule record.

get.description: Feedback, rubric, or instructional content controlled by outcomes, timing, or audience.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Feedback record.

get.description: Alternative content, catalog entries, and accessibility support metadata attached to QTI content.

get.summary: Get one QTI Accessibility Support record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Accessibility Support record.

get.description: A calculator, ruler, protractor, file, physical material, or vendor extension allowed or required during an item.

get.summary: Get one QTI Companion Material record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Companion Material record.

get.description: A link from QTI content to an academic standard, competency, skill, or other alignment target.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Alignment record.

get.description: A file preserved from the QTI package, such as XML, media, stylesheet, manifest, or other referenced resource.

get.summary: Get one QTI Package Artifact record

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Platform ID for the QTI Package Artifact record.

QtiPackage.description: An imported assessment bundle containing QTI XML, resources, media, metadata, and a manifest.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this QTI package.

packageIdentifier.description: The package ID supplied by the publisher, item bank, authoring tool, or import process.

qtiVersion.description: The QTI version the package claims to use.

x-valueDescriptions.3.0: The current QTI 3 assessment, section, and item model targeted by the platform.
x-valueDescriptions.2.2: A legacy QTI version the platform may preserve or migrate, but not the lead model.

sourceSystem.description: The publisher, item bank, LMS, or authoring tool that supplied the package.

validationStatus.description: Whether the platform has checked the package and found it valid, invalid, warning-only, or not yet checked.

x-valueDescriptions.pending: The platform has not checked the package yet.
x-valueDescriptions.invalid: The package failed validation and should not be trusted for delivery.
x-valueDescriptions.warning: The package is usable but has non-blocking issues that should be reviewed.

validationErrorCount.description: How many validation problems were found during import.

manifestPath.description: The location of the package manifest file inside the package.

originalFileUri.description: Where the platform stores the original uploaded package file.

importedAt.description: When the platform received or imported the package.

QtiAssessmentItem.description: One question, task, or prompt plus its response variables, scoring rules, body content, feedback, and accessibility metadata.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this item.

packageId.description: The QTI package this item came from.

identifier.description: The local QTI identifier for the item inside its package.

title.description: The item title used to browse or select the item.

label.description: An authoring-system label for the item.

language.description: The main language of the item as a language tag.

authoringToolName.description: The tool that created the item.

authoringToolVersion.description: The version of the authoring tool that created the item.

adaptive.description: Whether the item can change based on learner responses or test logic.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

timeDependent.description: Whether timing can affect response processing or scoring for this item.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

itemBodySummary.description: A safe summary of the visible question body, not necessarily the full item HTML/XML.

primaryInteractionType.description: The main way the learner answers this item.

x-valueDescriptions.matchInteraction: Match choices from one set to another.
x-valueDescriptions.gapMatchInteraction: Put choices into gaps in surrounding content.
x-valueDescriptions.extendedTextInteraction: Type an essay or longer response.
x-valueDescriptions.inlineChoiceInteraction: Choose text inside a sentence or passage.
x-valueDescriptions.hotspotInteraction: Click or tap one or more regions on an image.
x-valueDescriptions.selectPointInteraction: Mark one or more points on an image.
x-valueDescriptions.graphicAssociateInteraction: Pair image regions with each other.
x-valueDescriptions.positionObjectInteraction: Place an image object onto a stage.
x-valueDescriptions.sliderInteraction: Choose a number on a range.
x-valueDescriptions.drawingInteraction: Draw or mark up an image or canvas.
x-valueDescriptions.mediaInteraction: Play or interact with audio or video.
x-valueDescriptions.endAttemptInteraction: Trigger response processing, often for a hint or action button.
x-valueDescriptions.portableCustomInteraction: Use a packaged custom interaction module.
x-valueDescriptions.customInteraction: Use proprietary custom behavior preserved for compatibility.

maxScore.description: The highest normal score this item can produce when known.

hasCorrectResponse.description: Whether the item includes a declared correct response.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

accessibilityCatalogId.description: The accessibility catalog record attached to this item, if any.

sourceHref.description: The package-relative XML file or resource path for this item.

QtiAssessmentStimulus.description: Shared content such as a reading passage, chart, scenario, or media asset used by one or more items.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this stimulus.

packageId.description: The QTI package this stimulus came from.

identifier.description: The local QTI identifier for the stimulus.

title.description: The stimulus title used to browse or select it.

language.description: The main language of the stimulus as a language tag.

stimulusBodySummary.description: A safe summary of the passage, chart, media, or other shared content.

accessibilityCatalogId.description: The accessibility catalog record attached to this stimulus, if any.

sourceHref.description: The package-relative XML file or resource path for this stimulus.

QtiAssessmentTest.description: A whole test definition, including parts, sections, item references, timing, outcomes, and feedback.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this test.

packageId.description: The QTI package this test came from.

identifier.description: The local QTI identifier for the test.

classTokens.description: Style or category tokens from the QTI test; this is not a school class.

authoringToolName.description: The tool that created the test.

authoringToolVersion.description: The version of the tool that created the test.

timeLimitSeconds.description: The maximum time allowed for the test when known, in seconds.

outcomeProcessingSummary.description: A safe summary of how test-level outcomes are calculated.

sourceHref.description: The package-relative XML file or resource path for this test.

QtiTestPart.description: A major part of a test that controls navigation, submission, timing, and item-session behavior.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this test part.

testId.description: The test that contains this part.

identifier.description: The local QTI identifier for this test part.

title.description: The title for this part, if shown or managed separately.

navigationMode.description: Whether the learner must go in order or can move around.

x-valueDescriptions.linear: The learner proceeds in order and cannot freely return to earlier items.
x-valueDescriptions.nonlinear: The learner may navigate items in a freer order.

submissionMode.description: Whether answers are submitted item-by-item or together.

x-valueDescriptions.individual: Each item is submitted and processed separately.
x-valueDescriptions.simultaneous: Responses are submitted together at the end of the part.

maxTimeSeconds.description: The maximum time allowed for this part, in seconds.

itemSessionControlId.description: The timing/review/attempt-control record for items in this part, if modeled separately.

QtiAssessmentSection.description: A group inside a test that can organize item references, nested sections, randomization, and section-level rules.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this section.

testId.description: The test that contains this section.

parentSectionId.description: The section that contains this section, if sections are nested.

identifier.description: The local QTI identifier for the section.

title.description: The title used to browse or present the section.

requiredInSelection.description: Whether this section must be selected when test selection rules run.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

fixedInShuffle.description: Whether this section keeps its position when nearby content is shuffled.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

visibleToCandidate.description: Whether the learner can see this as a visible section.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

keepTogether.description: Whether children of an invisible shuffled section should move together as a group.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

selectionCount.description: How many child parts should be selected from this section, if selection is used.

orderingShuffle.description: Whether child parts may be presented in shuffled order.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

QtiItemRef.description: A test's reference to an item file, including test-specific category, timing, weight, and selection behavior.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this item reference.

sectionId.description: The section containing this item reference.

itemId.description: The resolved platform item record, if the href has been matched to an item.

identifier.description: The test-local identifier for this item reference.

href.description: The package-relative link to the item XML file.

requiredInSelection.description: Whether this item must be selected when selection rules run.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

fixedInShuffle.description: Whether this item keeps its position during shuffling.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

category.description: Category tags used for reporting, subscores, or selection rules.

weight.description: Test-specific score weight for this item.

timeLimitSeconds.description: The maximum time allowed for this item reference, in seconds.

QtiVariableDeclaration.description: A response, outcome, template, or context variable used by an item or test.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this variable declaration.

ownerObjectType.description: The kind of QTI object that owns this variable.

x-valueDescriptions.testPart: A major part of a QTI test.
x-valueDescriptions.itemRef: A test or section reference to an item.
x-valueDescriptions.interaction: The answer interaction inside an item.

ownerId.description: The platform ID of the item, test, or other owner object.

declarationKind.description: Whether this variable stores an answer, score/status outcome, template value, or context value.

x-valueDescriptions.response: A variable that stores a learner answer.
x-valueDescriptions.outcome: A variable that stores a score, status, or other result.
x-valueDescriptions.template: A variable used to create item variants.
x-valueDescriptions.context: A global value available to processing rules.

cardinality.description: Whether the variable holds one value, many values, ordered values, or a record.

x-valueDescriptions.multiple: A list of values where order does not matter.
x-valueDescriptions.ordered: A list of values where order matters.
x-valueDescriptions.record: A set of named values with their own types.

baseType.description: The type of each value held by the variable.

x-valueDescriptions.file: Uploaded file bytes with content type and optional filename.
x-valueDescriptions.pair: Two IDs where direction does not matter.

defaultValueSummary.description: A safe summary of the default value, if any.

correctResponseSummary.description: A safe summary of the correct response, if the item declares one.

mappingSummary.description: A safe summary of how response values map to scores or outcomes.

view.description: The audience this outcome or feedback-related variable is intended for.

x-valueDescriptions.author: Intended for someone authoring the assessment.
x-valueDescriptions.candidate: Intended for the learner or test taker.
x-valueDescriptions.proctor: Intended for the person supervising the assessment.
x-valueDescriptions.scorer: Intended for someone scoring the assessment.
x-valueDescriptions.testConstructor: Intended for someone assembling the test.
x-valueDescriptions.tutor: Intended for an educator or tutor supporting the learner.

QtiInteraction.description: The part of an item where the learner answers, such as choosing, typing, matching, uploading, clicking, or using media.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this interaction.

responseIdentifier.description: The response variable that stores the learner's answer for this interaction.

x-valueDescriptions.matchInteraction: Match choices from one set to another.
x-valueDescriptions.gapMatchInteraction: Put choices into gaps in surrounding content.
x-valueDescriptions.extendedTextInteraction: Type an essay or longer response.
x-valueDescriptions.inlineChoiceInteraction: Choose text inside a sentence or passage.
x-valueDescriptions.hotspotInteraction: Click or tap one or more regions on an image.
x-valueDescriptions.selectPointInteraction: Mark one or more points on an image.
x-valueDescriptions.graphicAssociateInteraction: Pair image regions with each other.
x-valueDescriptions.positionObjectInteraction: Place an image object onto a stage.
x-valueDescriptions.sliderInteraction: Choose a number on a range.
x-valueDescriptions.drawingInteraction: Draw or mark up an image or canvas.
x-valueDescriptions.mediaInteraction: Play or interact with audio or video.
x-valueDescriptions.endAttemptInteraction: Trigger response processing, often for a hint or action button.
x-valueDescriptions.portableCustomInteraction: Use a packaged custom interaction module.
x-valueDescriptions.customInteraction: Use proprietary custom behavior preserved for compatibility.

promptSummary.description: A safe summary of the instructions or prompt shown with the interaction.

shuffle.description: Whether choices should appear in randomized order.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

minChoices.description: The smallest number of choices a learner must select.

maxChoices.description: The largest number of choices a learner may select; zero often means no limit.

minAssociations.description: The smallest number of pairings or matches required.

maxAssociations.description: The largest number of pairings or matches allowed.

orientation.description: Whether layout naturally reads horizontally or vertically.

x-valueDescriptions.horizontal: Laid out left-to-right or along a horizontal axis.
x-valueDescriptions.vertical: Laid out top-to-bottom or along a vertical axis.

expectedLength.description: Expected response length for text interactions.

textFormat.description: Whether typed text is plain, preformatted, or XHTML.

x-valueDescriptions.preformatted: Text where spacing and line breaks should be preserved.
x-valueDescriptions.xhtml: Structured rich text marked up as XHTML.

shape.description: The hotspot shape used by graphic interactions.

x-valueDescriptions.ellipse: An ellipse hotspot preserved for compatibility.

QtiProcessingRule.description: A preserved summary of response, outcome, template, branch, or precondition logic from QTI XML.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this processing rule.

ownerObjectType.description: The kind of QTI object that owns this rule.

x-valueDescriptions.testPart: A major part of a QTI test.
x-valueDescriptions.itemRef: A test or section reference to an item.
x-valueDescriptions.interaction: The answer interaction inside an item.

ownerId.description: The platform ID of the object that owns this rule.

x-valueDescriptions.responseProcessing: Rules that calculate item outcomes from learner responses.
x-valueDescriptions.outcomeProcessing: Rules that calculate test outcomes from item outcomes.
x-valueDescriptions.templateProcessing: Rules that set template values before delivery.
x-valueDescriptions.branchRule: Logic that jumps to a target when a condition is true.
x-valueDescriptions.preCondition: Logic that decides whether to skip a part, section, or item.

templateUri.description: A reusable QTI processing template URI, if one is referenced.

targetIdentifier.description: The target item, section, outcome, or special destination used by this rule.

logicSummary.description: A safe plain-language summary of the rule logic.

QtiFeedback.description: Feedback, rubric, or instructional content controlled by outcomes, timing, or audience.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this feedback record.

ownerObjectType.description: The kind of QTI object that owns this feedback.

x-valueDescriptions.testPart: A major part of a QTI test.
x-valueDescriptions.itemRef: A test or section reference to an item.
x-valueDescriptions.interaction: The answer interaction inside an item.

ownerId.description: The platform ID of the object that owns this feedback.

feedbackKind.description: Whether this is item feedback, test feedback, or a rubric block.

x-valueDescriptions.modalFeedback: Item-level feedback shown based on an outcome value.
x-valueDescriptions.testFeedback: Test-level feedback shown during or after the test.
x-valueDescriptions.rubricBlock: Directions, scoring, navigation, or support information for a selected audience.

outcomeIdentifier.description: The outcome variable that controls whether this feedback appears.

showHide.description: Whether matching the identifier shows or hides the feedback.

x-valueDescriptions.show: Hidden by default; show when the condition matches.
x-valueDescriptions.hide: Shown by default; hide when the condition matches.

feedbackIdentifier.description: The value tested against an outcome to decide whether the feedback applies.

title.description: An optional title for the feedback or rubric.

access.description: Whether test feedback appears during the test or at the end.

x-valueDescriptions.during: Feedback may appear during the test.
x-valueDescriptions.atEnd: Feedback appears at the end of the test.

rubricUse.description: The purpose of a rubric block.

x-valueDescriptions.navigation: Information about moving around the assessment.

view.description: The audience that should see this feedback or rubric.

x-valueDescriptions.author: Intended for someone authoring the assessment.
x-valueDescriptions.candidate: Intended for the learner or test taker.
x-valueDescriptions.proctor: Intended for the person supervising the assessment.
x-valueDescriptions.scorer: Intended for someone scoring the assessment.
x-valueDescriptions.testConstructor: Intended for someone assembling the test.
x-valueDescriptions.tutor: Intended for an educator or tutor supporting the learner.

bodySummary.description: A safe summary of the feedback or rubric content.

QtiAccessibilitySupport.description: Alternative content, catalog entries, and accessibility support metadata attached to QTI content.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this accessibility support record.

ownerObjectType.description: The kind of QTI object this support belongs to.

x-valueDescriptions.testPart: A major part of a QTI test.
x-valueDescriptions.itemRef: A test or section reference to an item.
x-valueDescriptions.interaction: The answer interaction inside an item.

ownerId.description: The platform ID of the object this support belongs to.

supportType.description: The kind of accessibility support available.

x-valueDescriptions.spoken: Spoken version or content is available.

catalogIdref.description: The QTI catalog ID reference for this support.

ttsSuppression.description: Whether text-to-speech should be suppressed for this content.

contentSummary.description: A safe summary of the alternative or support content.

sensitive.description: Whether this support metadata may reveal accessibility needs or accommodations.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

QtiCompanionMaterial.description: A calculator, ruler, protractor, file, physical material, or vendor extension allowed or required during an item.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this companion material.

itemId.description: The item this companion material applies to.

x-valueDescriptions.calculator: A calculator is allowed or required.
x-valueDescriptions.ruler: A ruler is allowed or required.
x-valueDescriptions.protractor: A protractor is allowed or required.
x-valueDescriptions.digitalMaterial: A digital file or material is available.
x-valueDescriptions.physicalMaterial: A physical item or material is needed.

calculatorType.description: The calculator capability allowed or required.

title.description: A human-facing name for the material.

requiredForDelivery.description: Whether the item requires this material to be available.

x-valueDescriptions.false: No, this condition does not apply.

materialUri.description: A package file path, external URI, or local reference for the material.

QtiAlignment.description: A link from QTI content to an academic standard, competency, skill, or other alignment target.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this alignment.

ownerObjectType.description: The kind of QTI object being aligned.

x-valueDescriptions.testPart: A major part of a QTI test.
x-valueDescriptions.itemRef: A test or section reference to an item.
x-valueDescriptions.interaction: The answer interaction inside an item.

ownerId.description: The platform ID of the aligned QTI object.

targetType.description: What kind of target the QTI content is aligned to.

x-valueDescriptions.caseItem: A CASE competency, standard, or skill item.
x-valueDescriptions.uri: A web URI or external standards target.
x-valueDescriptions.local: A local district, publisher, or authoring-system alignment target.

targetIdentifier.description: The CASE item ID, URI, or local standard identifier.

alignmentLabel.description: The human-readable standard, competency, or skill label.

sourceMetadataUri.description: Where the original QTI or package metadata described this alignment.

QtiPackageArtifact.description: A file preserved from the QTI package, such as XML, media, stylesheet, manifest, or other referenced resource.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this package artifact.

href.description: The package-relative path to the file.

mediaType.description: The file's MIME type when known.

artifactRole.description: The role this file plays in the QTI package.

x-valueDescriptions.itemXml: A QTI assessment item XML file.
x-valueDescriptions.testXml: A QTI assessment test XML file.
x-valueDescriptions.media: An image, audio, video, or other media file.
x-valueDescriptions.stylesheet: A CSS or style file used to render content.

sha256.description: A hash used to confirm the file did not change.

storageUri.description: Where the platform stores this artifact after import.

x-unsupported-or-deferred.reason: The platform is first modeling repository, import, search, alignment, and governance. Delivery requires a tested QTI runtime engine.

x-unsupported-or-deferred.area: Every low-level XML child node as a SQL column
x-unsupported-or-deferred.reason: The original QTI XML is preserved as the source artifact. Only public platform fields are projected into SQL/API fields.
Processing logic is preserved and summarized. Executing it safely belongs to a QTI runtime service.
CAT depends on mature item metadata, delivery services, and psychometric configuration beyond this repository dictionary.
Vendor extensions are preserved and governed, but not promoted to core platform fields until intentionally modeled.
